input.prompt:
I need to find the exact schema or TypeScript type definitions for the `clikit.json` configuration file. 
Check `src/types.ts`, `src/config.ts`, or any `schema.json` files in the repository. 
Identify all available fields, their types, and default values.

input.description: List all files in the project excluding node_modules

todos.content: Map schema fields to default values from README and schema descriptions
Construct full clikit.json content with all possible fields and defaults
Verify JSON against schema (manual check of fields) and run lsp_diagnostics if applicable
Map schema fields to default values from README and schema descriptions
Construct full clikit.json content with all possible fields and defaults
Verify JSON against schema (manual check of fields) and run lsp_diagnostics if applicable

lines:
{
  "$schema": "https://unpkg.com/clikit-plugin@latest/schema.json",
  "disabled_agents": [],
  "disabled_commands": [],
  "disabled_skills": [],
  "agents": {
    "build": {
      "model": "google/gemini-3-flash-preview",
      "temperature": 0.2,
      "mode": "primary",
      "disabled": false,
      "tools": {},
      "permission": {
        "edit": "allow",
        "bash": "allow",
        "webfetch": "allow"
      }
    },
    "plan": {
      "model": "google/gemini-3-flash-preview",
      "mode": "primary"
    },
    "oracle": {
      "model": "google/gemini-3-flash-preview",
      "mode": "subagent"
    },
    "research": {
      "model": "google/gemini-3-flash-preview",
      "mode": "subagent"
    },
    "explore": {
      "model": "google/gemini-3-flash-preview",
      "mode": "subagent"
    },
    "review": {
      "model": "google/gemini-3-flash-preview",
      "mode": "subagent"
    },
    "vision": {
      "model": "google/gemini-3-flash-preview",
      "mode": "subagent"
    }
  },
  "commands": {
    "discuss": {},
    "create": {},
    "research": {},
    "design": {},
    "start": {},
    "ship": {},
    "verify": {},
    "debug": {},
    "status": {},
    "init": {},
    "handoff": {},
    "resume": {},
    "commit": {},
    "pr": {}
  },
  "skills": {
    "sources": [],
    "enable": [
      "writing-plans",
      "executing-plans",
      "ritual-workflow",
      "session-management",
      "deep-research",
      "source-code-research",
      "test-driven-development",
      "condition-based-waiting",
      "testing-anti-patterns",
      "verification-before-completion",
      "vercel-react-best-practices",
      "systematic-debugging",
      "root-cause-tracing",
      "defense-in-depth",
      "beads",
      "playwright",
      "chrome-devtools",
      "requesting-code-review",
      "receiving-code-review",
      "writing-skills"
    ],
    "disable": []
  },
  "lsp": {},
  "workflow": {
    "mode": "compressed",
    "active_roles": [
      "build",
      "plan",
      "review",
      "coordinator"
    ],
    "use_packets": true,
    "embed_verify_in_start": true,
    "verify_is_audit": true,
    "subagent_call_budget": 2
  },
  "hooks": {
    "session_logging": false,
    "tool_logging": false,
    "todo_enforcer": {
      "enabled": true,
      "warn_on_incomplete": false,
      "beads_authoritative": true
    },
    "empty_message_sanitizer": {
      "enabled": true,
      "log_empty": false,
      "placeholder": "[empty output]"
    },
    "git_guard": {
      "enabled": true,
      "allow_force_with_lease": false
    },
    "security_check": {
      "enabled": true,
      "block_commits": true
    },
    "subagent_question_blocker": {
      "enabled": true
    },
    "truncator": {
      "enabled": true,
      "max_output_chars": 20000,
      "max_output_lines": 500,
      "preserve_head_lines": 100,
      "preserve_tail_lines": 100,
      "packet_friendly": true,
      "log": false
    },
    "memory_digest": {
      "enabled": true,
      "max_per_type": 50,
      "include_types": [
        "decision",
        "learning",
        "discovery",
        "pattern",
        "bugfix",
        "config",
        "preference"
      ],
      "index_highlights_per_type": 3,
      "write_topic_files": true,
      "compact_mode": true,
      "log": false
    },
    "todo_beads_sync": {
      "enabled": false,
      "close_missing": false,
      "mode": "disabled",
      "log": false
    },
    "cass_memory": {
      "enabled": true,
      "context_on_session_created": true,
      "reflect_on_session_idle": true,
      "context_limit": 10,
      "reflect_days": 7,
      "cm_path": "memory/cass_memory.sqlite",
      "log": false
    },
    "beads_context": {
      "enabled": true,
      "max_issues": 10,
      "include_closed": false,
      "active_only": true,
      "ready_limit": 3,
      "log": false
    }
  }
}

input.prompt:
I need to find where the default configuration for CliKit is defined in the source code.
Look for a `DEFAULT_CONFIG` constant or similar in `src/config.ts` or `src/constants.ts`.
Compare these values with what is currently in `clikit.json`.
Also, confirm if the config loader supports JSONC (comments in JSON).
input.description: Check default value implementation in code
